result.name: Improved ASCII STL Validator With Normal Consistency
result.description: Validates ASCII STL meshes for closure, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and declared-normal consistency with vertex winding.

manifest.name: Batch ASCII STL Validation Report Generator
manifest.description: Validates a supplier batch of ASCII STL files for open edges, non-manifold edges, degenerate triangles, and inverted normals, then writes validation_report.json.
